parameters.jsCode:
const escaped = $json.html; // or whatever field your agent outputs

const unescaped = escaped
  .replace(/\\n/g, '\n')
  .replace(/\\"/g, '"')
  .replace(/\\'/g, "'")
  .replace(/\\\\/g, '\\');
return [{
  html: unescaped, // raw HTML string
  format: "A4",
  userId: "7c433589-4482-4c88-b73b-8b383557a1a3",
  request_type: "",
  description: "HTML to PDF Conversion. Learn more.",
  documentType: "General",
  source: "",
  hash: "",
  landscape: false,
  margin: {
    top: "1cm",
    right: "1cm",
    bottom: "1cm",
    left: "1cm"
  }
}];
